Text.Main: Now entering the Bloodsteel Mines

Reactions.Name: L1_addwp_0
Reactions.WaypointText: Collect 5 Bloodsteel ore in the mines

Text.Main: Radio Operator: The mines are on the road, stick to the paved roads and you'll find it.
Mozak:  Yer runnin me road greenie and you 'aven't paid no tax.  Make with the cash quick like yeh? 1000 clink will do ya, less than that and we'll teach you the meaning of Hamalzah's grace, get me?

You be smarter than most greenie dogs, yeh?

Too bad.

Another time greenie, I'm sure.  Let's go boys.

What's the matter greenie, don't have the clink?  All you greenie dogs be the same neh?  Too stupid to pay, too stupid to live.  

Bye bye greenie.

[$emote]The engine of Mozak's car roars to life, blaring out music from the Old World.  His crew leaps into their vehicles, quickly powering up their weapons, obviously they intend to make good on Mozak's threat.[$/emote]
Reinforcements have arrived!
Allied Champion:  Pikes.  What, you thought you throwbacks would actually win?!
Allied Champion:  We are The Tribes of The Changed; we were chosen to walk this Changed Land, fools.  You cannot hold back our destiny.

Reactions.Name: L1_addwp_1
Reactions.WaypointText: Collect 5 Bloodsteel ore in the mines

Text.Main: Bandits defeated!  Continue into the mines.
Mozak:  Ho greenie, you're stronger than you look, yeh?
Pike ambush!
Mozak:  Ho greenie, we meet again.
Mozak:  Miss me greenie?  Bet you thought you wouldn't see me again, yeh?
Mozak:  Another time dog!
Mozak: Hamalzah heal me!
Mozak:  Damn you greenies, damn you!  We'll meet again, yeh?
Champion:  Word is Mozak's here; we thought you'd like a hand.
Champion:  Looks like we got here just in time.
Champion: "Feh!  That wretched Pike has made good his escape!  I doubt'll be back again."
Champion: "You should head back to the mining road to resume The Rites of Ascension, []."
Mozak: Ha!  You're better than you look greenie!
Mozak:  But it will take more than you've got to kill Ol' Mozak.
Mozak: We'll meet again greenie.  Count on it.
Mozak: Grr!  You were lucky, greenie, but don't get cocky.
Mozak:  You're a fool if you think is over.  We'll see each other again, yeh?
Exit to Highway 667 N - "Western Front"
